summary: 0.7.0 alpha promotes the current tested player seam as the new milestone baseline before Favorites begins as the next 0.7.x capability lane.
operatorSignals: The latest 0.6.x slices closed the remaining player polish items, including hosted-root spatial audio.
The operator explicitly called the current tested seam 0.7.0.
actionsTaken: Promoted the existing tested seam to 0.7.0 alpha without adding new runtime behavior.
Updated repo canon so 0.7.0 is now the player milestone baseline and Favorites becomes the next 0.7.x lane.
Built and redeployed the raw dev_deploy seam under versioned 0.7.0 alpha filenames.
nonGoals: No Favorites implementation in this slice.
No new transport, sync, slideshow, or audio behavior beyond the promoted tested seam.
